summary: Full stack testing of Junagadh CPE Study Chapter website. All 13 backend API tests passed. All 7 frontend pages load and work correctly. Events registration, gallery lightbox, contact form, and noticeboard tabs all functional.

issues: data-testid='contact-email' is used on both the mailto <a> link in contact info AND on form email input - selector ambiguity. Minor since functionally the form works, but testid should be unique.
Placeholder text visible in footer: '[Address Line 1]', '[Phone Number]', '[Email Address]', '[PIN]' - needs real data from chapter
All names are placeholders: 'CA. [Chairman Name]', 'CA. [Vice Chairman Name]' etc. - expected once real names available

action_items: Fix duplicate data-testid='contact-email' - used on both the mailto link and email form input
Replace placeholder text in footer (address, phone, email, PIN) with actual chapter contact details
Replace placeholder committee member names with actual names when available
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid conflict: 'contact-email' used for both <a href='mailto:...'> and the form <input> - can cause issues in automated testing
Footer and contact info contains placeholder text in brackets - should be replaced before production launch
Registration success indicator: after form submission the modal closes but no visible success toast/notification was detected on the events page - consider adding a success notification

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all pages load and work, minor data-testid conflict noted

seed_data_creation: None - backend seeds on startup automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: First testing run. All APIs pass. All pages functional. Key items: 1) data-testid='contact-email' conflict on Contact page. 2) Placeholder content in footer/committee. 3) Event registration modal works and API call succeeds. 4) Gallery lightbox works. 5) Noticeboard and Newsletter use Publications dropdown in nav.
